title: Naruto Shinobi Origins
description: Naruto Shinobi Origins is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to experience the world of Naruto.
body:
![Naruto Shinobi Origins SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Jt84UiCF/images/0d06a5ea297d9a967d527898b4fe0fb94b4a3fd6.png)
# Overview
**Naruto Shinobi Origins** is a fantasy themed Modpack based on the anime/manga "Naruto". Unleash your chakra and master your dreams of becoming a shinobi or perhaps the art of ninjutsu instead. Spawn in and make your own custom Naruto character, join a hidden village and master jutsu, roam across the lands fighting bosses and powerful enemies. Power or peace what will your path be...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/naruto-shinobi-origins)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/naruto-shinobi-origins)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)

# Features
- [✔️] **Ninshu Origins** - Bring the world of Naruto into Minecraft. Bosses, enemies, weapons, jutsu and more.
- [✔️] **Performance** - Don't let that pesky performance get in the way of your fun! Enjoy a fully optimised pack for all systems!

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
